title: Historic Cavendish Laboratory and FormationQ Launch Applied Quantum Program Using IonQ's Technology Platform
why:
- The Cavendish Laboratory and FormationQ have launched an applied quantum program.
- The program will utilize IonQ's quantum computing technology platform.
- This collaboration brings together a historic scientific institution with a modern quantum technology provider.
- The initiative is focused on applied quantum computing, indicating a move toward practical real-world applications.
